items.claim: Alden Cora is a busy grappler with a strong single leg takedown and effective ground control.
items.quote: He's a busy grappler. He's got a nice little single leg. He'll snatch that leg up with a slight bend at the waist, and then he'll run the pipe on the ground. He's busy on top. Great control.

items.claim: Alden Cora is hittable and can be too calm in exchanges.
items.quote: while he is well-rounded, he can be a bit too calm and he is hitable.

items.claim: Steuart Nickel is a strong wrestler who utilizes his strength well to maintain control on the ground.
items.quote: a decent wrestler, a slick grappler. And when Steuart takes you down, he's got great control, and he's always working. He's a strong guy. He uses that strength really well.

items.claim: Steuart Nickel is on a three-fight losing streak in the UFC.
items.quote: He is coming off that third UFC loss in a row.

items.claim: Levi Rodriguez Jr. has solid takedown defense.
items.quote: He's got solid takedown defense. He does a really nice job stuffing takedowns

items.claim: Felipe Franco is a grappler who struggles with striking technique and relies on wild punches.
items.quote: Felipe Franco, a grappler who wings punches like crazy... His striking is pretty bad, but he does throw hard.

items.claim: Alvin Hines has high durability and can maintain his pace for 15 minutes.
items.quote: He is incredibly tough and he can take a beating for a full 15 minutes without slowing down.

items.claim: Alvin Hines is coming off a one-year suspension for testing positive for anabolic steroids.
items.quote: He is coming off that decision loss to Janata Denise about a year ago. He's taking on RJ Harris, a big dude who swings like a big dude... Alvin Hines, as I mentioned, coming back after a year-long suspension because he pissed hot.

items.claim: RJ Harris is fighting on short notice.
items.quote: Also, this is somewhat short notice for RJ Harris.

items.claim: Saky Co has poor defensive grappling and offers little when taken down.
items.quote: If he is taken down, he doesn't have much to offer.

items.claim: Jean Paul Lebanani has poor takedown technique.
Jean Paul Lebanani is susceptible to being snapped back by a simple jab.
items.quote: he can be snapped back with a simple jab.
